title: Rekindle
description: This is a mod that adds a lot to the vanilla experience
body:
Installation

Rekindle for 1.16+ requires Fabric Loader and Fabric API

Descripstion

With Rekindle experience a whole new experience of minecraft, Explore the new biomes and structures that the mod adds
In addition to the tools and armor that will help you to survive, There are a lot of unique new blocks for builders together with variants of old familiar vanilla blocks.

Features

New armors, tools, weapons, biomes, tools, etc...
Ability to configure blocks, items, structures, biomes(work in progress)
Integrations with some other mods(work in progress).  

Issues

If you have any questions or issues
post them down in the comments or in the issue tracker
For more details you can join the discord to talk to me personally
